landing.title: Infinity Gauntlet
landing.subtitle: A clean, secure, and intuitive task manager built to keep your work organized — wherever you are.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to stay productive

features.title: Kanban-style task management
features.description: Organize your tasks across Pending, Doing, and Done columns for a clear view of your progress.

features.title: Secure authentication
features.description: Your account is protected with JWT-based authentication and encrypted passwords.

features.title: Dark & light themes
features.description: Switch seamlessly between light and dark mode based on your preference.

features.title: Fully responsive
features.description: Manage your tasks from desktop, tablet, or mobile with a consistent experience.

features.title: Smart reminders
features.description: Stay on top of deadlines with notifications and reminders for your tasks.

features.title: Private workspace
features.description: Each user has their own isolated task list — your data is yours alone.
